title: Scars of Arcana
description: Explore what remains of a recovering world and restore magic to it's lands!
body:
![An image displaying the modpack's titlecard, "Minecraft - Scars Of Arcana", with a blurred forest background and additional text infront which reads "A Minecraft modpack with the goal of bringing magic back to a recovering world, without overshadowing what's already there."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7a1edea1350cb5a77cb5272dde57878a043f86_0.webp)
![An image with the title "Unleash The Arcane", below it are two open books displaying different forms of magic, the left book showcases the player's ability to perform totemic rites to alter the world around them, while the book on the right showcases the player's ability to bind their soul to powerful yet costly pacts.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306ce4ebbb59afa65a3d10a632f5db876a8bac24.png)![A continuation of the previous image, with a new title "Channel arcane energies into unique yet powerful trinkets!", below are displayed two open books, each showcasing a unique trinket and their respective crafting recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f1faec4922bb8f59fdcf7209ba5ac57fa491ce4_0.webp)
![An image with the title "Improved Storage", displaying 3 different crafting recipes for the bundle, backpack and sack items. Below the bundle's entry are the following descriptions: "Stores up to 64 of any stackable item", "Smaller stack sizes take up more space", "Cannot carry unstackables"; Below the backpack's entry are the following descriptions: "Provides an extra inventory's worth of storage", "Takes up your chestplate slot", "Can be placed as a physical block", "Cannot carry items unless equipped"; Below the sack's entry are the following descriptions: "Provides 12 slots worth of storage", "Can be placed as a physical block", "Inhibits movement when carrying too much".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a0d2462a4913d56e8234e2769507963fd1f0f05_0.webp)
![An image with the title "Cooking Expanded", displaying the texts: "New recipes, from simple to exotic!" accompanied by the crafting recipes for 3 different food items, "Featuring dynamic stack sizes:" accompanied by an example of how stack sizes correspond to different food types, "Exclusive food effects" accompanied by a display of two new effects, Comfort & Nourishment. On the right is a second panel with the following text: "Slice and dice through monsters for unique, transformative dishes!", alongside it are 3 more recipes and a graphic showcasing the Jump Boost effect transforming into Pouncing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9c17e460278c51e91ee371f10afdfdfb8e90586.png)
![An image with the title "In-Game Documentation", showcasing a custom advancement screen alongside the text "Custom advancements to guide you through progression and new content alike!", and two different item information tabs alongside text that reads "Informational tabs on multiple items providing you with context on how or what they can be used for".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b886467f346f6f94ead5e9ca1db35bb6dd8e802_0.webp)
![An image with the title "Enchantment Overhaul", accompanied by the following texts: "Choose your enchantments at a fair price", "Modify already enchanted items at anytime", "All XP is lost upon death, but safely stored", "XP Leveling scales less harshly", "Anvils never become too expensive". To the right is an image displaying the overhauled enchantment UI, as a player is in the process of enchanting their diamond pickaxe with Efficiency 2.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e3133458f3652efbabf64200821dffea3852dc_0.webp)![An image with the title "Beacons Reworked", accompanied by the texts: "New powerful beacon effects", "Beacon range boosted by material offered", "New tertiary layer of effects". To the right is a display of the overhauled beacon UI, showcasing the new effects and the beacon range scale.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07a9afd3b2b2fa6dde694bb8a50d65e7dc8f3939_0.webp)![An image with the title "Endless Possibilities", followed by the text: "While the end has been significantly overhauled, so has the journey up to that point!", "The materials required to reach the end have been chosen in a way to encourage players to worry about their journey, rather than their destination.", "The End is not meant to be 'The End', but simply another stop in your journey". Off to the side is an open book displaying crafting recipes for new, special ender eyes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faa3d3a07ff20e3c1f29332fe57e77a60c0fe3c5_0.webp)


## Text Transcript:
<details>

# Scars of Arcana

Is a Minecraft modpack with the goal to bring magic into the world, while maintaining Minecraft's vibe and core principals intact.

Magic is capable of being expressed in a variety of ways across this recovering land, such as through totemic rites which alter the world around them, or soulbinding pacts which infuse the player with powerful abilities at a pricy cost.

Alongside this, many changes to the vanilla game experience have been made aswell, such as:

* **Improved Storage** with the introduction of **bundles, backpacks and sacks!**
* **Expanded Cooking** through **limited food stack sizes** and a wide array of new food items
* **An overhauled enchantment system**, with reworks to how XP functions and allowing you to fairly pick out your gear's enchantments
* And **many other tweaks to vanilla features**, such as overhauled beacons and elytras!

To guide you through all these new changes and tweaks, a fully custom set of advancements have been implemented, alongside most items containing in-game descriptions on how they function or what they can be used for!

</details>
